tickets.hypothesis: Threshold coupling or upstream data fetch failures can collapse candidate output.
tickets.requested_change: Add per-filter reject counters and surface them in scanner_trace.
tickets.title: Investigate zero-candidate scan runs

tickets.hypothesis: Current run size is insufficient for stable inference.
tickets.requested_change: Attach sample-size penalty to planner confidence and show warning banner.
tickets.title: Strengthen small-sample safeguards

tickets.hypothesis: Fallback watchlist is now active but still needs explicit risk caps and expiry rules.
tickets.requested_change: Enforce fallback expiry in outcome-tracking jobs and alert when stale fallback rows accumulate.
tickets.title: Harden fallback watchlist governance in prod
